title: Trezor hardware wallet support is now live in Infinex
deployed_facts: Trezor hardware wallet support is live in Infinex
Trezor wallets appear alongside Ledger in your portfolio
Funds stay on the hardware device; Infinex displays them and routes transactions
The hardware wallet signs every transaction
headline: Trezor is live in Infinex.
subhead: Ledger and Trezor side by side in one portfolio.
tier_reason: Adding Trezor alongside Ledger completes hardware-wallet coverage for the dominant brands. Anyone using cold-key storage can now run Infinex as their primary surface — a structural milestone, not a feature flag.
